evaluations.summary: The artifact <outputs> section and contract package_files use basename or slug-template paths instead of the full canonical tool-relative paths required by the contract's required_outputs list.
evaluations.evidence_location: Artifact markdown <outputs> section; Artifact contract JSON package_files
evaluations.why_it_matters: ARB-008 requires one exact canonical path representation across the <outputs> section and contract package_files. Using basename and slug-template forms while required_outputs uses full paths creates path ambiguity for packaging, promotion, and governance validation.

notes: Contract required_outputs uses full canonical paths, but <outputs> and package_files do not match that representation.
